programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Butcher Baker: Terror in the Wilderness Part 1

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Butcher Baker: The Girls Who Got Away Part 2

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape

programme.title: Botched: The Bacon Bra
programme.desc: The doctors help a female bodybuilder who wants to look more feminine, Paul performs surgery on a woman who has large nostril anxiety, and Katella Dash will do anything to look like a human blow-up doll.

programme.title: Botched: Four Leeches and a Funeral
programme.desc: Reality star Dwight Eubanks says farewell to his nose with a funeral, a woman's boob job has left her with a suspicious bubble on her breast, and a busty performer gives the doctors a smashing show they'll never forget.

programme.title: Botched: Mo' Steroids Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Terry helps Mo Thugs rapper Guillermo 'Big Caz' Eiland and his case of 'Man Boobs,' former Model Jana Stoner who got breast implants in her butt after a Mexico surgery gone bad and a UK man with super-sized lips sees the doctors about his leaking filler.

programme.title: Botched: Dolly'd Up
programme.desc: A celebrity impersonator wants to fix her saggy skin, Paul helps a woman with a potentially unfixable nose, and Daniella 'two spirits' Mendez wants a convertible implant for both a male and female option.

programme.title: Botched: House of Horrors
programme.desc: The doctors help a woman whose nose was botched by the 'House of Horrors.' Also, Tanya hopes to remove a scar that reminds her of her unborn twin and the infamous Sarah Burge visits the doctors to find eternal youth.

programme.title: Botched: Knuckles and Knockers
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow tries to separate a uniboob and Dr. Nassif fights to fix a former boxer’s nose. Plus, the Doctors deliver some unexpected news to actress and model Shauna Sand.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Botched: The Pec Whisperer
programme.desc: 'The Human Doll,' Justin Jedlica, returns to help Dr. Dubrow pump up a 'pec-less' body builder. Also, a former Miss India hopes Dr. Nassif can perfect her pig nose and the Doctors have a heart-to-heart with a woman obsessed with body modification.

programme.title: Botched: Attack of the 3,000cc Implants
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow takes on the biggest breast case of his career, Dr. Nassif tackles a soldier's botched nose and the doctors meet a man whose life goal is to look like a super hero.

programme.title: Botched: Say Yes to the Breasts
programme.desc: Former actress Heather fought a flesh-eating disease that left her with no breasts. Dr. Dubrow helps a spiritual woman who has a butt on her belly and Dr. Nassif helps a man whose doctor left a thumbprint on his nose.

programme.title: Botched: The Serial Filler
programme.desc: Farrah Abraham visits the doctors about her blown up lips, a friend of Dr. Dubrow's seeks help for his botched stomach and Jessa hopes the doctors can help erase the physical reminders left from a fatal car accident.

programme.title: Botched: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Paul follows a hunch and orders more tests for a woman with a severely botched nose and discovers shocking news. The doctors work in tandem to get two 'botched bunnies' back in centerfold shape.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Give Me Some Mo!
programme.desc: The kitchen is more fun when Sunny Anderson and "Beach Bites'" Katie Lee decide who will take on Bobby Flay. Puerto Rican chef Andre Gomez and Dominican chef Ramon Perez duke it out in the kitchen for their shot at the master.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fry Me a River
programme.desc: Chopped judges Scott Conant and Geoffrey Zakarian have yet to take down the king. They return to the arena for redemption and to get the job done, they've brought in Nevada's Robert Hesse to battle New York's Michael Jenkins.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Marital Match
programme.desc: Husband and wife Cody and Sam Carroll of Cajun Aces compete to prove that love is a kitchen battlefield. It's only fitting that "The Kitchen's" dynamic duo, Sunny Anderson and Jeff Mauro, officiate the attempt to send Bobby Flay off unhappily ever after.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Revenge Is Best Served Bold
programme.desc: Bobby Flay's former co-worker Leia Gaccione and Asian expert Tony Nguyen are back for more, returning to the arena for a second chance to take Bobby down.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Perched for Victory
programme.desc: "Worst Cooks in America's" Anne Burrell gets a little help from her friend Valerie Bertinelli on the mission to bring down Bobby Flay. They recruit Napa Valley's Elizabeth Binder and Washington, D.C.'s Mike Ellis to help them.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Only in New York
programme.desc: Chefs Alex Guarnaschelli and Michael Symon join forces to take down their fellow Iron Chef, Bobby Flay. Tensions rise as Daniel Holzmon dukes it out with Palak Patel.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Chopped's Alex Guarnaschelli and Geoffrey Zakarian have brought in two talented pastry chefs, Erica Land and Jacqueline Joy Dino, to sprinkle the kitchen with sugar and spice and a loss for Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Drop the Mic
programme.desc: Chopped's Amanda Freitag and comedian Jo Koy show up to boo Bobby Flay out of his kitchen. They invite Washington, D.C.'s Ryan Hackney and Nora Haron from the California Bay Area to bring their kitchen skills to beat Bobby.

programme.title: Best Baker in America: The Mid-Atlantic
programme.desc: The nine bakers' master challenge has a Mid-Atlantic theme: making their own upscale version of Maryland's Smith Island cake and incorporating boardwalk popcorn. The bake-off round involves a dessert inspired by the Pennsylvania classic shoofly pie.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets: Bake the Bizarre!
programme.desc: The competing chefs face an odd traditional Japanese sweet and a very large egg in the first basket. In the second basket, a weird ice cream is a treat compared to a certain animal's feet.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets: Dude! Where's My Dessert?
programme.desc: All in good fun, the baskets are packed with ingredients that might appeal to the basic male human. Sharpshooter cupcakes and a meaty snack are part of the riddle in round one, and beer brownies get enthusiastic support from the finalists in round three.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Mountain Emergency

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Winter Is Here

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wild Life: Winter Closing In

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Trust or Die
programme.desc: The Deeters are dog-mushers with a homestead on the edge of disaster. Bears dine on the dog food and the forest around them is a deadly tinder box. The Raneys must push them to make drastic changes, but discover the Deeters don't trust outsiders.

The Zoo: The Great Turtle Comeback

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Pushing the Limits

programme.desc: A couple who rushed to buy their first house discover that they don't have the means or space to host their big family gatherings. She wants to find a large, more suitable home for guests, but he thinks the house can be improved to suit all their needs.

programme.title: House Hunters: Colonial vs. Midcentury Cape Cod in Marblehead, Massachusetts
programme.desc: A couple wants to put down roots in Marblehead, Massachusetts, and is looking for a home with plenty of space for their big family. However, he wants a classic Colonial that's been around for centuries, while she prefers something that was built recently.

programme.title: House Hunters: Ready to Adult in Atlanta
programme.desc: A young Atlanta woman hunts for her first home and must decide if she wants to live alone in a condo or buy a single-family home for herself and some roommates.

programme.title: House Hunters: A Starter Home In Austin
programme.desc: Austin, Texas, seems the perfect place for a young couple's starter. While he is hoping for a place with impressive craftsmanship and a spacious backyard, she longs for a home that will be modern and sleek but still have a cozy vibe.

programme.title: Renovation Island: The Deep End
programme.desc: Demolition begins in the honeymoon suite and pool. The crew uncovers decrepit plumbing in the hotel block, putting stress on the build's schedule and budget. The Baeumlers reveal the completion of the resort's pool.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Power Struggle

programme.title: Renovation Island: Bottoms Up
programme.desc: The Baeumlers navigate a new learning curve in hospitality as their build transitions to a business. Sarah and Bryan argue over projects that are still not finished, despite their ticking timeline.

programme.title: Renovation Island: This Build Is a Beach
programme.desc: Tension runs high as the Baeumlers begin landscaping. Sarah tells Bryan she needs a break from the build. On their one year anniversary of living on the island, Bryan and Sarah look back at how their renovation project has evolved.

programme.desc: In a historic Massachusetts house, ghost hunter Jack Kenna uncovers a shocking family secret that's been hidden for centuries. Investigators are called in to save a young teenager being attacked in her sleep, but the identity of the assailant is alarming.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: The Imaginary Friend
programme.desc: Joe Cetrone battles a demonic entity intent on harming his own son. In Ohio, a child's imaginary friend is revealed to be something much darker when it starts to tear the family apart and investigators are stalked in an old Colorado jail.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: The Axman Cometh
programme.desc: When investigators hunt the spirit of a man who took his own life, one investigator is overcome by something even darker. In Iowa, a father-daughter team comes face-to-face with the ghost of an ax-murderer.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: Crazy Train
programme.desc: All hell breaks loose when paranormal investigators disturb tortured spirits trapped in an old passenger train with a tragic past. One of New England's top ghost hunters is mercilessly toyed with by the demonic spirit of a child in a haunted mansion.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: The Doppelganger
programme.desc: Marie Yates is convinced that the death of her grandmother was the work of an evil spirit, but becomes the target when she tries to investigate. Called in to help a woman with a mysterious illness, George Acosta discovers the only cure is an exorcism.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: Ghost Child
programme.desc: Investigator Michelle Desrochers must go to extraordinary lengths to stop a terrifying demonic spirit attacking a four-year boy. A ghost hunter has to face his own fear of child ghosts when called to help a family in Medway, Massachusetts.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Deadly Attraction - Wichita, KS
programme.desc: A medium investigates a home in Wichita that is the center of a bone-chilling paranormal mystery dating back to the cowboy days of the 1800s.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Final Curtain Call - Vancouver, Washington
programme.desc: Amy and Steve investigate reports of frightening paranormal activity at the Slocum House Theater in Vancouver, Washington. While Steve unearths the location's bloody history, Amy discovers a hotbed of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Below Deck: Let Them Eat Penis Cake!
programme.desc: Captain Lee calls an all staff meeting to address the previous night's debauchery and gives the crew an ultimatum. Brian refuses to apologize for his behaviour at the night market and tells Courtney he is fed up, causing relationship turmoil.

programme.title: Below Deck: Big Girls, Do Cry
programme.desc: Putting the final charter at risk, Kate sets Kevin up for failure by allowing him to present the primary's requested erotic cake knowing she already went to bed. Captain Lee arranges a Full Moon Party on a private beach for the crew's final night.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Panic On A Track
programme.desc: The crew tries to shake off hangovers and hurt feelings after a divisive night out. The deckies spring into action when a surge of wind pushes Parsifal toward the dock. Dani contemplates her future and has a panic attack while under sail.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Never Before Scene: Knotty Knotty
programme.desc: Follow the crew of a luxury sailing yacht cruising the blue waters of Corfu, Greece.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Crash Boom Bang!
programme.desc: The crew is excited to enjoy a much-need day off together, but things get touchy when the couples’ PDA goes on full display. Amidst the lovers vs non-lovers quarrel, Sydney drops bombs that re-ignite Daisy and Gary’s interior vs exterior feud.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Crash Boom Bang!

programme.desc: This episode uncovers the psychological, biological and sociological make-up of these dangerous murderers. A former FBI profiler, a criminal psychologist, journalists, scientists and more reveal the secret motives of past serial killers.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: The White House

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: West Point

programme.desc: The universe is constantly expanding and so is our understanding of it.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Into the Murder Labyrinth
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth once used by a secret police force could warp the mind and turn friend into foe.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Examine new discoveries which are revealing the deepest and darkest secrets of Stonehenge, showing how ancient magic, bizarre rituals, and brutal murder built this strange monument.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Kingdom of Kush
programme.desc: Pyramids in the deserts of Sudan are the ruins of a powerful lost civilization that rivaled the pharaohs of ancient Egypt, and using cutting-edge tech and archaeological methods, experts are revealing the secrets behind the mysterious Kingdom of Kush.

programme.title: Unearthed: Jericho's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: New discoveries at the lost city of Jericho offer fresh evidence about the biblical battle that brought its impregnable walls down. Using the latest tech, experts might reveal if Joshua and the Israelites really conquered this ancient city and how.

programme.title: Unearthed: Wrath of Attila the Hun
programme.desc: New evidence reveals if Attila the Hun was responsible for the fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of Venice
programme.desc: Venice was once a fearsome superpower home to secrets, wealth, and treachery. Today, scientists use pioneering acoustic imaging technology to discover the city's ancient foundations and reveal how it's still standing.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters at Fort Madness
programme.desc: Alien monoliths haunting the coast of England. An obliterated jungle pointing to a brutal narco gold rush. Evidence of a strange blood-red creature emerging from the deep.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Enigmas of Area 51
programme.desc: Satellites capture two strange patterns in the desert, and they are right next to Area 51.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Crop Circles
programme.desc: Crop circles spotted on an island in the Mediterranean might not be from aliens, but from a threat closer to home: Nazis; new discoveries help experts uncover who made them and for what sinister purpose.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Phantoms in the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Evidence of a mysterious 5,000-year-old structure suddenly appears in Ireland. A top-secret machine that can see back in time. A satanic pentagram in the snow that points to witchcraft in the New World.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The King at Roswell
programme.desc: When a strange, red plane is discovered near the site of the Roswell UFO incident, experts wonder if the aircraft has Nazi or extraterrestrial origins, and their investigation reveals new secrets about one of America's most famous faces.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Temple of the Island Eater
programme.desc: Satellites capture evidence of a mysterious structure in a remote and rocky area of Hawaii, and when experts investigate, what they find could point to human sacrifices and the wrath of a shape-shifting god.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of the Vampires
programme.desc: Satellite images reveal a long-lost village buried in a dense forest; archaeologists investigate and uncover a mysterious gravesite with the remains of decapitated skeletons and possible evidence of vampire burials.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the Holy Land's greatest mysteries, but new discoveries might finally reveal the hidden meaning behind the strange texts, and as experts get closer to unmasking their author, they find clues of an ancient apocalypse.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Screams of the South Pacific
programme.desc: Serena Karlan leaves everything she knows behind to join her boyfriend, retired NBA champion Bison Dele, aboard his catamaran in the South Pacific. Serena is the happiest she's ever been, until Dele's estranged brother surfaces and throws them off course.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Cold as Ice
programme.desc: A family's search for new beginnings backfires when their move from Hawaii to Alaska creates an environment perfect for murder.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Why Did She Leave?
programme.desc: She is an innocent bride-to-be; he's a six-year-old schoolboy. Both are on the road, away from home, when they disappear.

programme.title: Cold Blooded Medicine
programme.desc: Newlyweds Lauran and Matthew Phelps are a made-for-social-media couple: geeky, young, attractive and fun. This image is shattered by a panicked midnight call to 911 to report a gruesome death.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Lonesome Cowboy
programme.desc: When a body is discovered in a backyard, police have little to go on. The homeowner has recently disappeared, and all that he has left behind are clues posted online. Police wonder if they will lead to the identity of the victim, or the killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Price of Fame
programme.desc: In 2001, actor Robert Blake finds his new wife, Bonny Lee Bakely, shot in the head in the couple's car. The largest homicide investigation in LAPD history uncovers a story of blind ambition and betrayal.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Little Girl Gone
programme.desc: In June 2003 a five-year-old girl walks around the corner to her friend's house and vanishes into thin air. As police investigate they realize this quaint Midwest community is hiding some disturbing secrets that may never be fully uncovered.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Lonesome Cowboy
programme.desc: When a body is discovered in a backyard, police have little to go on. The homeowner has recently disappeared, and all that he has left behind are clues posted online. Police wonder if they will lead to the identity of the victim, or the killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Price of Fame
programme.desc: In 2001, actor Robert Blake finds his new wife, Bonny Lee Bakely, shot in the head in the couple's car. The largest homicide investigation in LAPD history uncovers a story of blind ambition and betrayal.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Children of Thunder
programme.desc: In the summer of 2000, panic overwhelms the Bay Area when bags full of body parts start appearing all over the region. Investigators follow the trail of grisly clues and it leads to the discovery of a secret cult carrying out a sinister scheme.

programme.title: Cold Blooded Medicine
programme.desc: Newlyweds Lauran and Matthew Phelps are a made-for-social-media couple: geeky, young, attractive and fun. This image is shattered by a panicked midnight call to 911 to report a gruesome death.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: High School Revenge
programme.desc: A woman and her daughter are kidnapped and held hostage by a man exacting revenge from his high school days.

programme.title: Diabolical: Living Off the Dead
programme.desc: George Kalomeris is a family man who looks after the less fortunate in his community. But after a dying man fingers George as the gunman, police discovera monster more diabolical than anyone could ever imagine possible. ...and he's not acting alone.

programme.title: Deadly Women: DIY Burial
programme.desc: Dig into the world of these Deadly Women... and in their 'DIY Burial,' you will find blood and bone.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Forever and a Day
programme.desc: When a former police officer is dumped she takes the law into her own hands; a quiet housewife buries her marriage problems in the garden; and an excited fiancée turns into the worst kind of bridezilla.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Leaves Town
programme.desc: With hearts of stone, these Deadly Women give their men special send-offs when 'Love Leaves Town.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Quick Hits: DIY Murder
programme.desc: A territorial girlfriend in Georgia takes matters into her own hands; a Satan worshipping couple wreak havoc on unsuspecting men; a bored housewife will do anything to revive her party days.

programme.title: The Missing: Missing Mother and Child
programme.desc: Joanna Clark doesn't show up to work and her daughter, Shariece, misses school. They both vanish on the same day, just hours apart. And then pregnant Akia Eggleston misses her baby shower and is never seen again.

programme.title: Disappeared: The Long Way Home
programme.desc: Deanne Hastings, a 35-year-old Spokane mom, leaves a note that she's running to the store, but she never returns. As detectives uncover more information about Deanne's actions leading up to her disappearance, a slew of troubling theories emerge.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: Murder for Sale
programme.desc: A top real estate agent in Little Rock, Arkansas fails to return home after showing a house to a client.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Wicked Witness
programme.desc: What begins as a frantic 911 call to help an assaulted neighbor ends in the most bizarre investigation the small town of Walsenburg, Colorado has ever seen - complete with a twisted tale of torture, family secrets, and a fallen Jehovah's Witness.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Clown Did It
programme.desc: Nearly three decades after a woman was shot in her Palm Beach County, Fla., home by someone wearing a clown costume, two people who were there describe what they saw in this interview.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: The Long Night
programme.desc: When Charlotte, NC Detective Garry McFadden agrees to do a favor for a witness in one of his cases, he finds himself involved in a strange murder investigation that plays out over one of the longest nights of his career, leading to an unexpected killer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Check List
programme.desc: In 1991, a woman is found murdered inside a Nashville motel room. The investigation escalates after Detective Postiglione discovers a similar crime scene in Cincinnati, sending him on a year-long odyssey to capture a serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Lady in Red
programme.desc: A woman in red drops a dying man off at a firehouse and then vanishes. Police soon learn the victim is a contractor with a troubled personal life, but identifying the mystery woman is the hurdle they must overcome in order to bring him justice.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler's Zombie Army
programme.desc: Truth is revealed of the Allied 'monument men' discovery in 1945 of rotting corpses of Germanic heroes. A world of magic, high priests and secret castles is exposed.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Pandemic Pandemonium
programme.desc: History has taught us that when it comes to new viruses, humankind is still vulnerable, despite modern medicine. Meet people who are determined to survive the next global pandemic and the chaos that will ensue.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Biblical Armageddon
programme.desc: Discover the past and future of apocalyptic beliefs, the lengths people will go to ready for the end and the dark side of End Times prophecy.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Planet X
programme.desc: A look at the giant hidden planet with a gravitational pull so strong that it would literally cause the earth to turn upside down.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons
programme.desc: The most secret of secret societies, The Freemasons, are intertwined with American history. Most of the Founding Fathers and 14 Presidents were Freemasons. Some say Washington DC is laid out as a Masonic code.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Swimming With the Fishes
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew creates a backyard oasis in Siesta Key. They take an old, outdated pool and transform it into a natural lagoon.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Paradise on the Bay
programme.desc: A couple from Snead Island, Florida asks the Lucas Lagoons crew to create a bayside paradise. This outdoor living space, pool, spa, fire feature and kitchen will be built without any of Lucas' signature rock work.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The crew takes on the challenge of bringing the jungle to life in a suburban backyard.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Georgia Mountain Treehouse
programme.desc: A couple sets out to create their dream treehouse retreat in Northern Georgia overlooking the Blue Ridge Mountains. Although the build calls for a mile-long, uphill trek with their materials, the end result is the ultimate childhood dream come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin of No Return
programme.desc: An outdoorsy family of three is determined to build a mammoth off-grid cabin along Idaho's Salmon River after one of their properties was destroyed by a fire. The family takes on rapids to portage out materials and must finish before low tide hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Mountain House
programme.desc: A creative family builds a custom home where the mountains and desert collide in Colorado's last frontier. The dream project quickly turns into a job when the harsh terrain combines with the demanding pace they've set for themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Coastal Maine
programme.desc: Jason and Crystal always wanted an escape in the middle of Maine's secluded coastline for their family to unplug and enjoy nature. With the help of a small group of friends, they set their sights on building a 320-square-foot cabin in just 12 days.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Deadwood, SD
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide nosh brings him to Deadwood, South Dakota. He's in this Black Hills outlaw town to go back in time at an old west saloon, chow down on a fried state staple and tackle one tough hombre.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Scottsdale, AZ
programme.desc: Casey’s culinary quest brings him to Scottsdale, Arizona where he’ll fry up a Latin staple, take on a stone age feast, and take on a four-pound deli platter in the Chompie’s Day at the Deli Challenge.

programme.title: Good Eats: Et Tu Mame
programme.desc: That culinary chameleon the soybean turns up as edamame when host Alton Brown takes it from the sushi bar and into the kitchen.

programme.title: Good Eats: Live and Let Diet
programme.desc: Alton discusses how the four food groups helped him lose 50 lbs without dieting.

programme.title: Good Eats: Raising the Bar Again
programme.desc: Alton deconstructs cocktails and rebuilds them with Good Eats style.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics X: Chicken Parm
programme.desc: Alton Brown makes the argument that Italian food was actually invented in America, and that chicken parmesan is the dish where it all began. Yet, an Italian canned tomato makes it all possible.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dallas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the big and bold flavors that are decidedly Dallas. From comforting chicken fried steak and sweet, creamy pecan pie to hearty tortilla soup and steak aged for 240 days.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Asheville
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the iconic eats of Asheville, North Carolina. The eclectic food city features tangy barbecue, decadent sweet potato pie, mouth-watering fried chicken, succulent rainbow trout and giant soft-dough biscuits with savory gravy.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Birmingham
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Birmingham, Alabama, home to one of the fastest growing food scenes in America. From the state's signature barbecue to innovative takes on Southern cuisine, he gets a taste of what makes the Magic City so unique.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Miami
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Miami, Florida, where the food scene fuses new ideas with old classics. From sizzling Cuban dishes to Peruvian bites with a glitzy Miami twist, Andrew immerses himself in the bold and mouthwatering flavors of Latin America.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Palm Springs
programme.desc: Andrew spotlights the desert oasis of Palm Springs, CA. The sunny resort city features new and iconic spots serving up eats like grilled rib eye and bone marrow butter, the popular reuben stacker and the classic date milkshake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Emilia-Romagna
programme.desc: Andrew explores the region of Emilia-Romagna, Italy, and discovers ancient recipes and culinary classics including mortadella sausage, parmigiano reggiano, and tortellini in broth.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Hampshire Seacoast
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores New Hampshire's seacoast and finds that the bounty of the local waters is the star of the local cuisine, such as shrimp, scallops and haddock stuffed in a baked lobster and loaded into a chowder.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Goa
programme.desc: Andrew explores the local cuisine of Goa, a former Portuguese colony in western India.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: El Paso
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern is in El Paso, where Texas meets Mexico on the border as well as in the kitchen. The city is filled to the brim of its 10-gallon hat with Tex-Mex cuisine as well as Mexican classics.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Baja
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern dives in to the Mediterranean and seafood-heavy cuisine of Baja California, Mexico. From simple smoked tuna to crispy fish tacos, Caesar salad to zesty seafood cocktail hangover cures, Baja's cuisine is an international sensation.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Detroit
programme.desc: Andrew heads to the Motor City to grab a slice of Detroit-style pizza, line up for a Coney Island dog and chili fries, fill up on timeless Middle Eastern classics and dine at a Detroit institution in the making.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Orlando
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Orlando, Florida, to discover the incredible rich food scene that's often left in the shadow of Disney World.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Krakow
programme.desc: From peasant food to royal snacks, Andrew reveals what makes the food scene in Krakow, Poland, so delicious. The city's edible symbols take the form of pierogis, hearty stuffed cabbage rolls and whole-roasted pork knuckle.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Merida
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern ventures to Merida, the capital of the Mexican state of Yucatan, to explore the Mayan- and Spanish-influenced culture and cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Scottish Highlands
programme.desc: Andrew explores the bountiful larder and proud history that provides chefs in the Scottish Highlands with the building blocks for uniquely Highland dishes. He enjoys lean, flavourful Highland beef, buttery shellfish, and handheld meat pies.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Harlem
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores Harlem, a vibrant New York City neighborhood with a diverse cross-section of cultures. He highlights its colorful restaurants offering soul food, Caribbean classics, and even the national dish of Senegal.

programme.desc: During a frenzied phone call to Sgt. Gabriel, a parole board member is brutally murdered. Pope announces his plan to improve the image of the department but, in order for it to work, Brenda must first solve the murder.

programme.title: The Closer: Jump the Gun
programme.desc: A bank robbery supposedly committed by a known gang of thieves leaves a security guard dead. It also leaves a lot of unanswered questions about the prime suspects and why this latest robbery doesn't fit their regular pattern.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Three Little Words
programme.desc: The couples, who married as strangers just two and a half weeks ago, explore the potential to fall in love in the real world. And while some couples are inching closer and closer toward the 'L' word, others find themselves barely past the starting line.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Third Week's a Charm
programme.desc: Three weeks after being married at first sight, some couples struggle to start over while others face challenges that seem insurmountable. Luckily, Dr. Viviana is in town to offer help and hope.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: The Monthiversary
programme.desc: Approaching the first milestone, the couples are reminded of the commitment they made to a complete stranger one month ago. While some celebrate this achievement, others question their future with their spouses.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Must Love Dogs
programme.desc: All five husbands have become dog dads since marrying their stranger spouses. Some take on the responsibility with love and excitement, but for others, it causes a severe emotional backlash.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Unanswered Questions
programme.desc: With Decision Day less than three weeks away, the couples meet individually with Dr. Pepper and Pastor Cal to probe the serious questions they still have about their marriage.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Mommy's Dirty Deeds
programme.desc: Mike Williams mysteriously disappears on his wedding anniversary, and it looks like he may have been eaten by alligators. But looks can be deceiving. A break in the case reveals the married family man’s life wasn’t quite what he thought.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Mom's Deadly Secret
programme.desc: When Colorado soccer mom Paige Birgfeld suddenly vanishes, a small town is left on edge. As cops start to dig for clues, they make a shocking discovery, this devoted mom was living a secret double life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A successful and growing manufacturing company is suddenly hit with a massive computer crash, jeopardizing the future of the company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran is impeded when detectives' prime suspect provides a solid alibi, but forensic scientists are able to make a key discovery due to the killer's preference for a distinctive style of footwear.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Bicycle Thief
programme.desc: Phil is determined to help Luke prove to his mom that he is responsible enough to have the brand new bike they just got him. However, Phil ends up being the irresponsible one when a hot neighbour clouds his judgment.

programme.title: Modern Family: Come Fly With Me
programme.desc: After some nudging, Jay begrudgingly takes Phil out to fly his new model airplane, but a manoeuvre goes awry. Meanwhile, when Gloria drops Manny off to play with Luke, she ends up volunteering to take Alex dress shopping.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Incident
programme.desc: Claire and Mitchell's mother drops in for a surprise visit, determined to make amends with everyone she offended during what has been deemed 'The Incident' at Jay and Gloria's wedding. No one is happy to see her, and it all comes to a head at dinner.

programme.title: Modern Family: Coal Digger
programme.desc: The whole family is invited to Jay and Gloria's for a barbecue and football. However, an earlier incident at school between Manny and Luke makes things very awkward for Gloria and Claire, and things escalate when a not-so-flattering label is uttered.

programme.title: Modern Family: Run for Your Wife
programme.desc: As the kids head back to school, Phil oversteps when he misreads how Claire is coping with an empty nest. Over at Jay's, he and Gloria are in disagreement over Manny's interesting choice of outfit for his first day of class.

programme.title: Modern Family: En Garde
programme.desc: The family turns out to support Manny in a fencing tournament, which ignites everyone's competitive spirit. Meanwhile, Phil is determined to find where Luke's hidden talents lie.

programme.title: Modern Family: Great Expectations
programme.desc: With a history of giving bad anniversary gifts, Claire is determined to finally surprise Phil with an amazing one. Meanwhile, Mitchell and Cameron call up their party-girl for a long overdue night out on the town.

programme.title: Modern Family: Fizbo
programme.desc: Phil and Claire decide to throw Luke the biggest and best birthday party, but when Cameron shows up as Fizbo the Clown, it sets off a chain of events that ends with someone in the hospital.

programme.title: Modern Family: Undeck the Halls
programme.desc: Christmas is in full swing at the Dunphy house until the kids get in some trouble and Phil and Claire threaten to take away Christmas until one of them fesses up.

programme.title: Modern Family: Up All Night
programme.desc: Gloria is less than pleased with Jay's reaction to the arrival of Javier, Manny's infamously unreliable dad. Meanwhile, Phil is suffering from kidney stones, and his dramatics lead Claire to call for hot firefighters to take him to the hospital.

programme.title: Modern Family: Fifteen Percent

programme.title: Modern Family: Moon Landing
programme.desc: Claire feels slightly inadequate when her old friend Valerie visits and is nothing like Claire remembered. Meanwhile, Jay has an unsettling locker-room moment when he and Cameron go play racquetball.

programme.title: Modern Family: My Funky Valentine
programme.desc: Phil and Claire break from their traditional Valentine's Day dinner date and plan a little role-play excursion. Meanwhile, Jay and Gloria's ideas of romance clash when he takes her to a comedy show, and Mitchell and Cameron play Cupid for Manny.

programme.title: Modern Family: Fears
programme.desc: When Phil and Luke embark on a discovery expedition underneath the house, Phil tries not to let his fear of the dark and creepy-crawlies get the best of him. Meanwhile, Claire takes a nervous Haley to the DMV for her driver's test.

programme.title: Modern Family: Truth Be Told
programme.desc: After reconnecting on Facebook, Phil invites his old high school girlfriend to drop by the house but his friendly visit quickly turns into trouble.

programme.title: Modern Family: Starry Night
programme.desc: Phil and Claire each tackle one of their kids' school projects. Meanwhile, Jay and Mitchell set out on their traditional father-son outing to see the meteor showers.

programme.title: Modern Family: Game Changer
programme.desc: It could not be more perfect that Phil's birthday and the release date of a hot new product coincide, and he wants nothing so much as to be one of the first people to get one.

programme.title: Modern Family: Benched
programme.desc: When Luke and Manny's hot-tempered basketball coach quits in the middle of a game, Jay and Phil both jockey to fill the position.

programme.title: Modern Family: Travels With Scout
programme.desc: Claire is caught off guard when Phil's father shows up in an RV with a little four-legged friend. Cameron offers to fill in as a drummer for Dylan's band, and Jay and Gloria suffer the consequences when they take Manny to a traumatizing horror movie.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Kit for Cowboy Cameron

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Feeding Now, Feeding Later
programme.desc: Ree makes spicy stewed beef, pimento cheese and bacon grits, roasted broccoli salad and a sour cream and parsley dressing.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Easy Eats
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks super easy eats with her kids, starting with a fabulous foursome of wafflewiches: turkey bacon, reuben, roast beef and fluffernutter. Plus, Ree makes shortcut homemade ravioli, a stunning blackberry icebox cake and an omelet in a mug.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cousin Jilly/ Gloria's Cafe

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.desc: Cricket struggles to get the best birthday present for his best friend, Remy. After almost getting in a dirt bike accident, Cricket decides to live his life in shelter.

programme.title: Jessie: Romancing the Crone
programme.desc: Jessie and the kids must think of a creative way to retrieve the tiara Jessie dropped on Mrs. Chesterfield's terrace when she refuses to give it back. They decide to ask Bertram to ask her on a date so they can recover Mrs. Ross' tiara.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Secret-Admirerer-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Josh makes up a reason to spend time with Maddie. Meanwhile, Joey and Parker believe the Voltage set is haunted.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Vive-La-Rooney
programme.desc: When Liv needs to learn French for an upcoming interview, her mom decides to immerse her in the language and culture. Meanwhile, Maddie is thinking about dating again.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Songwriting & Starfish

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Everglades and Allygators
programme.desc: The gang heads to Shiny Money's houseboat, and, while Austin and Ally are working on a song, Trish and Dez accidentally lure in a legendary alligator. Chaos quickly ensues as they try to keep the houseboat and their summer vacation afloat.

programme.desc: When Bob can't leave his house to watch a parade, the pups enlist a family of ducks to march past the house. Bingo and Rolly head to England to learn how a queen is treated.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to get away from a self-fetching stick that begins chasing them. Then, when Bob says he needs a pot of gold, the pups search for one at the end of a rainbow.

programme.desc: Bluey turns a tree stump into a game of Helicopter. Chloe tries to teach her dad to play Bluey's game. Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Killer Crash
programme.desc: A terrifying crash off a mountain road leaves one woman dead and her husband injured. But the fatal accident raises suspicions as a family fights to expose the real story.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Frank Rodriguez was a Navy vet who dedicated his life to helping needy children, not a guy with many enemies. Figuring out who would want him dead was a challenge. How he died was also a mystery investigators needed to solve to catch his killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: What happened in Cara Ryan's bedroom was a mystery. She admitted she shot her ex-husband, but investigators needed to know if it was murder or self-defense. Detectives heard several versions of the story, but for a jury, there was only one truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Someone Was Waiting
programme.desc: When a captivating, sweet natured single mom was found dead in her garage, detectives in Frisco, Texas uncovered a series of potential suspects, all of them connected in different ways to her complicated and secretive life.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Haunting
programme.desc: Police believed a pair of double homicides in Nebraska, five years apart, might be connected. Investigators working to solve the crimes feared the killer might strike again.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Tangled Web
programme.desc: Sam and Danielle Dreher appeared to have a storybook marriage but this ending was not happily ever after. When Sam was murdered, investigators discovered a twisted tale of secrets, lies and infidelity.

programme.title: Lockup: Long Island Extended Stay: No More Franks and Beans
programme.desc: A first time inmate says he must turn to violence to avoid becoming a victim, an accused rapist gets into more trouble in jail, and what he does next has some questioning his motives. And one female inmate attacks another during church services.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw: The Little Things
programme.desc: Jail stays are getting longer and longer, due to everything from budget cuts that shut down courtrooms to overwhelmed public defenders juggling dozens of cases at a time and increased bail amounts.

programme.title: Lockup: Long Island Extended Stay: Red and Whites

programme.title: Lockup: Savannah Extended Stay: Wis-Dumb
programme.desc: A planned romantic weekend turns into a nightmare for one young couple. Then, a fight sends two women to segregation, and for one of the combatants, the isolation takes its toll.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: One Moment
programme.desc: She was a young mom, pregnant with her second child, when she was gunned down on her way to work. Police zeroed in on the men in her life. To help find her killer, her sisters became amateur detectives and uncovered a secret.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Murder on Nantucket Island
programme.desc: She was a savvy entrepreneur. He got his start in finance. Their connection was instant but when their summer love cooled, tempers flared and the relationship took a tragic turn. It seemed like an open and shut case but there was a surprise in store.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in Pleasant Grove
programme.desc: The doctor and the model made a stunning couple. Together they built a loving family. Her death was sudden but ruled natural causes. Secrets remained hidden for years. Then, her daughters became amateur detectives to help unlock the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Killing in Cobb County
programme.desc: It is a story of obsession that boiled over into a brutal crime. Right away, one woman said she knew what happened. Yet, it took years to bring the alleged killer to trial and the verdict was far from the end of this case.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Sister's Search
programme.desc: Aasha Davis moved to Hollywood with big dreams. Her sister Lesley followed for support. Then, Lesley went missing and Aasha was desperate to find her. In a town built on deception, police came up with a high-stakes plan to smoke out their suspect.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Under a Halloween Moon
programme.desc: It was just before Halloween. Joel Lovelien and his fiancé headed to a local bar packed with people in costume. Then, Joel stepped outside and walked into a troubling mystery. Police rounded up potential suspects, but could they unmask a killer?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Other Side of Paradise
programme.desc: Sandra Galas was born and raised in paradise. So how did something so ugly happen there? Police investigated two men in Sandra's life, but the case went cold. Her father refused to give up, relentlessly pursuing the truth for more than a decade.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: A Deadly Con

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Deadly Delivery

programme.title: Forbidden History: James Bond Revealed
programme.desc: A group of experts uncovers the truth behind Ian Fleming's fictional world of James Bond, and reveals that it may be more real than imagined.

programme.desc: Three inmates are said to have escaped from Alcatraz prison, but even today, it's never been proven. New evidence might finally crack this notorious cold case, as experts use forensic science and cutting-edge tech to investigate fresh leads.

programme.desc: Brand-new evidence reveals the secrets of a Nazi program to build a nuclear bomb, and using cutting-edge science and tech, experts uncover classified files that reveal how close Hitler came to this terrifying superweapon.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Hitler's Escape Enigma
programme.desc: Adolph Hitler disappears from the world in an apparent suicide at the end of WWII, but theories of his possible escape continue to circulate; experts use cutting-edge forensic science to examine remains that could finally solve the mystery of his fate.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Antarctic Trail of Doom
programme.desc: The Scott Antarctic Expedition aspired to conquer the South Pole before anyone else, but this great endeavor of exploration never returned; now, newly uncovered evidence suggests this team may have succumbed to something more sinister than harsh elements.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Yellowstone Supervolcano
programme.desc: Beneath Yellowstone National Park is one of the world's largest active volcanos, and it's poised to erupt at any moment; experts use seismic technology and visual imaging to reveal its catastrophic threat.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Finding Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Amelia Earhart's disappearance is one of America's greatest unsolved mysteries, but now, forensic science might finally crack the case, as experts examine human remains that could be proof positive of her whereabouts.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Secrets of the Scorpion

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Secrets of the Sonic Weapon

programme.desc: Young mother Gabby McKenzie feels like she's finally back on her feet after a bad break-up with the father of her son. But when a new man begins spending time at her dad's place, it's not long before her family home becomes a violent war zone.

programme.title: Never Say Goodbye: Fatal Premonition
programme.desc: When a newly retired schoolteacher vanishes into thin air, his daughter fears the worst. But nothing could prepare her for the series of mysterious events that would follow, revealing a world of deception and double identity.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: In the Dead of Night
programme.desc: In Rison, Arkansas, a young woman is abducted from her home in the middle of the night. When investigators ultimately dig up her body in the woods, they uncover a horrible murder plot that led to the victim's gruesome demise.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Murder at the House of God
programme.desc: In January 2014, Nathan and Krystal Maddox are gunned down just seconds after leaving a remote Texan church. The brutal double murder leaves a close-knit community traumatized and looking for answers.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Spilling Blood Along the Way
programme.desc: A young woman comes to America looking for her ticket to love, riches, and power, yet in the land of opportunity, she is dropped in the middle of mysterious, murderous circumstances. Later, a tale of haves and have-nots, and a case of unstoppable greed.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Slenderman
programme.desc: New details emerged in the trial of the two girls who stabbed their best friend 19 times and left her for dead in the Wisconsin woods.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Dream Home
programme.desc: A Peruvian immigrant is discovered murdered and police have to ask could there be more to the American success story than meets the eye.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Married to Death
programme.desc: After a wild Christmas party, Ed Amos wakes to find his wife, Bobbe dead from an apparent cocaine overdose. When her toxicology report suggests foul play, detectives dig into their pasts to uncover greed, secret love affairs, and suspicious deaths.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Film director Adrienne Shelly is discovered hanging by a bed sheet from the shower rod in her bathroom. It looks like a suicide, but her husband insists it was murder. And detectives are starting to believe him...

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: In July of 2010, NBA star and family man Lorenzen Wright goes missing outside of Memphis, TN. When his dead body is discovered in the woods, investigators find that this case is far from a slam dunk.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks
programme.desc: Uncover the killer genes in the tank's family tree.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks

programme.title: How the World Ends: Biblical Armageddon
programme.desc: Discover the past and future of apocalyptic beliefs, the lengths people will go to ready for the end and the dark side of End Times prophecy.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Planet X
programme.desc: A look at the giant hidden planet with a gravitational pull so strong that it would literally cause the earth to turn upside down.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Pandemic Pandemonium
programme.desc: History has taught us that when it comes to new viruses, humankind is still vulnerable, despite modern medicine. Meet people who are determined to survive the next global pandemic and the chaos that will ensue.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.desc: A young couple leave the Air Force to build a cabin and start a new life in Alaska. With only three weeks to make it ready before winter, they call in family and friends to help. Follow their journey as they endure the elements and handcraft their home.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Riverfront House
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs take on a Victorian house in Wellsville, OH. Key items salvaged include harlequin windows, corbels and front porch columns. Back at the shop, Mike and Tay build a wine rack from old brick molds.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restored: 1952 Midcentury Masterpiece
programme.desc: A couple wants to renovate their mid-century modern California ranch home but are not sure where to begin. Brett works to blend her traditional style with his more modern tastes for an extensive and unique remodel.

programme.title: Restored: 1930s Colorful Spanish Colonial Farmhouse
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1930s two-story Spanish Colonial farmhouse in Fontana, California. He learns the rich history of the home which then guides his design plan for the house exterior, entryway, living room and kitchen.

programme.title: Restored: 1927 Storybook Cottage
programme.desc: Preservationist Brett Waterman transforms homes with bad renovations and ugly additions.

programme.title: Restored: 1887 Victorian Mansion
programme.desc: Brett tackles a stunning historic Victorian home.

programme.title: Restored: 1954 Modern California Ranch
programme.desc: Preservationist Brett Waterman transforms homes with bad renovations and ugly additions.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: We're in Business
programme.desc: Mike and MJ decide to go into business together to buy houses and renovate them right. But MJ is in for a surprise when he discovers Mike has already purchased their first project, then finds another potential investment 3.5 hours away.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Demo, Digging and Dancing
programme.desc: Mike and MJ add a partial second story to the country house while dangerous structural issues in the river house force them to take down the roof and second floor walls.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions and Delays
programme.desc: Trusses go up at the river house until MJ learns that the permits for the new build have not yet been approved. Mike goes to the council meeting hoping to hear good news, but it's a waiting game in the meantime. Designer Sarah Richardson offers advice.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Debates, Decisions, Designer
programme.desc: The leaching bed is replaced at the country house, and work progresses until Mike and MJ find out an open permit remains on the barn. Later, the big day finally arrives when MJ and Lisa get married in a picturesque setting, as long as the rain holds off.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Game Changer
programme.desc: Mike's vision for open concept at the suburban house hits a structural snag and MJ attempts to rein him in before the budget takes another hit. A fun surprise awaits the team at the river house, until Mike throws another curveball at MJ.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard BBQ Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking drops in at two backyard cookouts where the smoke is thick and the fires are hot. He helps guest chef Jeremy Conner prepare a fish roast at renowned bed and breakfast Maison Madeleine in Breaux Bridge, L.A.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lighting Up Louisiana
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Louisiana, where smoked meat makes an appearance in many classic Cajun dishes. He meets Chef Nathanial Zimet, who serves North Carolina-style smoked whole hog in po' boy sandwiches at Bourree in New Orleans.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Houston, TX
programme.desc: Casey two-steps down to Houston, Texas, for some tex-mex tastiness, including a colossal 22-ounce chicken-fried steak and the ultimate spicy challenge: a burger topped with seven of the world's hottest chile peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Milwaukee, WI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Milwaukee for some epic Brew City eats, including a pitcher-sized Bloody Mary garnished with a whole chicken and a four-and-a-half-pound Reuben sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Daytona Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Casey's delicious mission brings him to Daytona Beach, Florida, where he takes on a mammoth three-tier sandwich stacked with two burgers, six pieces of Mahi Mahi, two pieces of Texas toast and a ten-ounce bun.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Pittsburgh, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Pittsburgh for creative eats and a five-pound sandwich loaded with meat, cheese, fries and coleslaw.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Nashville, TN
programme.desc: Casey's mouthwatering mission brings him to Tennessee, where he faces his hottest challenge yet: three jumbo chicken tenders smothered in a Carolina Reaper-infused sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Palm Springs, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary quest takes him back in time to Palm Springs, California, where he comes face-to-face with a three-pound skyscraper of a sandwich loaded with every deli meat imaginable.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide feast brings him to Alaska, where he cracks into crab legs fit for a king at Slippery Salmon Bar and Grill in Anchorage. In Talkeetna, he samples the local wild game, ordering a slab of reindeer meatloaf at Denali BrewPub.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland (Maine)
programme.desc: Adam Richman visits the land of lighthouses and lobsters: Portland, ME. His main event awaits him at the Tradewinds Café where he'll take on the Manimal Challenge.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Whole Hog
programme.desc: Michael Symon smokes a whole hog for a juicy pulled pork sandwich in Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Savory
programme.desc: Scott Conant shows Michael his favourite burger and brew bar in an out-of-the-way corner of New Orleans, and then in Kansas City, Michael learns how two brother have stormed the classic barbecue scene with their award winning smoked meat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Smokey
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, where a place he went as a kid combines several classic sweets to make a one-of-a-kind dessert burger.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Bring the Heat
programme.desc: In Casey's years of facing off against food, he's taken on his fair share of heat. Casey's counting down the hottest, culminating in a challenge so spicy it may crack the Scoville scale and the number.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Decadent Desserts
programme.desc: Casey's sojourn of sustenance has had no shortage of sweets, and now it's time to celebrate the best of the best. We're counting down the most decadent desserts in Man vs. Food history and inducting them into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Wild Smoke and Fiery Burgers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon finds a spicy burger that ignites a four-alarm fire, and a chorizo-pineapple burger sings a perfect harmony of sweet and heat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Stuffed, Spicy and Cheesy
programme.desc: In Queens, N.Y., Michael Symon gets in touch with his Greek heritage with a classic lamb and feta cheeseburger, and then he sinks his teeth into an Italian-style burger stuffed with smoky mozzarella and prosciutto.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Tastes of the Tropics
programme.desc: Pastry chef phenom, Ron Ben-Israel, hangs with Michael Symon in Baton Rouge, La. to feast on a mile-high key lime pie and Caribbean-inspired brisket melt.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Finger-Licking Good
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli joins Michael Symon at one of his favorite Manhattan spots, where they combine a bottomless beer selection with the most high-octane hot dog known to man.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Hot Chicken, Spicy Beef and Ice Cream Sundaes

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Eating Vermont

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Santa Barbara Bargains

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Belly Full In Buffalo
programme.desc: Ali Khan is eating his way through the best meal deals in Buffalo, starting with griddle toast logs with cream cheese filling. For lunch, he takes down a trio of flavorful and innovative tacos.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations: Heartland
programme.desc: New York and San Francisco look down on the way the rest of the country eats.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Glasgow
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the culinary scene of Glasgow, Scotland, which is just as diverse as the city's landscape. From macaroni pies to venison haggis, the whimsical curiosity of the people is reflected in the iconic dishes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: NOLA
programme.desc: New Orleans is a vibrant, eclectic city and its cuisine has been fused with a multitude of culinary influences. Andrew Zimmern explores the classic dishes from po' boys and gumbo to oysters Rockefeller and bananas Foster.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New York City
programme.desc: New York City is a melting pot of various ethnicities and culinary fusion. Andrew explores the iconic foods from the Big Apple like mile-high pastrami sandwiches, bagels and lox, pizza by the slice and the American hamburger.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Los Angeles
