programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Karate Kidder/ Playing Favorites
programme.desc: Dave, Simon and Theodore are worried for Alvin's safety after Alvin enters a karate contest. Later, when Alvin suspects Simon is Dave's favorite, he and Theo challenge Simon to a go-cart race to win Dave's favor.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theodore's Calling/ Clumsy Jeanette
programme.desc: Miss Croner attempts to help Theodore discover his true calling in life. Jeanette is suddenly very clumsy because of her new glasses.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Deserted/ The Great Snack Off
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: School Alone/ It Came From Outer Space
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany get stuck at school with a ghost that roams the halls; Alvin gets some unwanted attention when he claims to have found a meteor.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Big Bro Theodore/ No Putts, No Glory
programme.desc: When Theodore mistakenly thinks he's the oldest brother, he tries to be a better role model for Alvin and Simon.Alvin tricks Theodore into believing he's great at mini golf which backfires when Theo signs up for a tournament.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Two and a Half Babies/ Dust Busters
programme.desc: Chet Ubetcha quits his job. Dad becomes the new news man. Timmy must get Chet back in order to save the city. Timmy and the fairies have to rid his home of fairy dust. The basement comes alive. Mom and Dad go to a fake spa.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Finding Emo/ Anchor's Away
programme.desc: Timmy likes a new girl at school. He wishes he was 'emo' and stops caring about everything. Foop and Poof have to take care of an egg for a school project. Foop breaks it and swaps it with a dangerous one.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Flea Market/ Copy Can't
programme.desc: Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado; Ronnie Anne notices that she's the only person Carlitos won't copy.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Snack Pact/ The Horror-Scope
programme.desc: The family finds a tamale cart and tries to keep it secret from Abuela. And, Ronnie Anne doesn't believe in an astrological prediction until it comes true.

programme.title: The Loud House: Funny Business/ Snow Bored
programme.desc: Lincoln becomes Luan's clown assistant, but starts hogging the spotlight. The Loud kids set out to show Lisa what is 'fun' about a snow day.

programme.title: The Loud House: Lincoln Loud: Girl Guru/ Come Sale Away
programme.desc: For a class assignment, Lincoln and Clyde must start a business, so they decide to sell Lincoln's girl expertise. It's time for the Loud family annual garage sale, and every kid is determined to out-sell the others.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Loudest Yard/ Raw Deal
programme.desc: When Lincoln's mom signs him up for peewee football, Lincoln schemes to have Lynn take his spot.

programme.title: The Loud House: Making the Grade/ Vantastic Voyage
programme.desc: When Lincoln's four-year-old sister, Lisa, gets put into his 5th grade class, his social standing is at stake. Sick of their family van always falling apart, the kids decide to try and trick Dad into buying a cool new van.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Blood, Sweat and Fears
programme.desc: The group must pass through the ominous Swamp of Fears.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shellback Shenanigans/ Hide and Then What Happens?
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick play hide n' seek and SpongeBob searches the world for Patrick. Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Towers/ Mrs. Puff, You're Fired
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krabs into Krusty Towers, an upscale hotel where the customer is king, even the most obnoxious and demanding ones. This pushes Squidward to the point of quitting and returning as a guest to make a series of outrageous requests.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Buried in Time/ Enchanted Tiki Dream
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a dream world for Squidward; The gang is caught in a time capsule.

programme.title: It's Pony
programme.desc: A normal girls' life is made extraordinary by her best friend: a hilarious talking pony.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shuffleboarding/ Prefessor Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get carried away when they fill in for Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. Squidward poses as the teacher at a prestigious music school. But SpongeBob and Patrick show up and nearly blow his cover.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Fish in Town/ Love That Squid
programme.desc: A new neighbour moves in and becomes Squidward’s best friend.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Clams
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs takes SpongeBob and Squidward fishing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squidward's School for Grown Ups/ Oral Report
programme.desc: When Pat suddenly grows a very grown-up beard, he decides it's time to act like a grown-up, too.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One
programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business. Later, Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SquarePants Family Vacation
programme.desc: While on a family road trip to the Great Barrier Reef, SpongeBob and Patrick get lost and end up on the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krabby Patty That Ate Bikini Bottom / Bubble Buddy Returns
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs uses Sandy's experimental growth formula on a Krabby Patty and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman Begins/ Plankton's Good Eye
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick learn the secret origins of Mermaid Man and Branacle Boy from the heroes themselves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mooncation/ Mr. Krabs Takes a Vacation
programme.desc: SpongeBob house-sits for Sandy, and all is quiet until Patrick shows up. After losing their passes, SpongeBob and Squidward try to sneak backstage at the sold-out Kelpy G show.

programme.title: The Loud House: Lincoln Loud: Girl Guru/ Come Sale Away
programme.desc: For a class assignment, Lincoln and Clyde must start a business, so they decide to sell Lincoln's girl expertise. It's time for the Loud family annual garage sale, and every kid is determined to out-sell the others.

programme.desc: Lincoln becomes Luan's clown assistant, but starts hogging the spotlight. The Loud kids set out to show Lisa what is 'fun' about a snow day.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Loudest Yard/ Raw Deal
programme.desc: When Lincoln's mom signs him up for peewee football, Lincoln schemes to have Lynn take his spot.

programme.title: The Loud House: Making the Grade/ Vantastic Voyage
programme.desc: When Lincoln's four-year-old sister, Lisa, gets put into his 5th grade class, his social standing is at stake. Sick of their family van always falling apart, the kids decide to try and trick Dad into buying a cool new van.

programme.title: The Loud House: Patching Things Up/ Cheater by the Dozen
programme.desc: Lola and Lana try out for Bluebell Scouts but discover one of them might be more suited for it. When Lincoln and Clyde think Bobby is cheating on Lori they follow him around town gathering evidence.

programme.title: The Loud House: Baby Steps/ Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: When Clyde thinks his parents are having another baby he goes to Lincoln for help on how to be a great big brother. When Lori and Leni both buy the same dress, a fight breaks out leading to Defcon five in the Loud house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Rocket/ Squeaky Boots
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally launch Sandy's rocket ship into space; SpongeBob receives boots in lieu of pay.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot
programme.desc: Instead of paying to patch up a hole in the wall, Mr. Krabs decides to use it to make more money by turning it into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast, Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, teaches SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Overlooked/ Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Against Simon's wishes, Alvin borrows his latest invention, an invisibility suit, only to get the zipper stuck. When Theodore wishes on a shooting star, the Chipmunks try to learn what the wish is so they can make it come true.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: It Came From Outer Space
programme.desc: Alvin forgets to bring in a show-and-tell piece for science class so he just picks up the closest rock he can find and tries to convince everyone that it's a meteorite.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Allergic Reaction/ Lice-enced to Teach
programme.desc: Theodore develops an allergy to an unknown ingredient; Jeanette and the Chipmunks try to rescue a chimpanzee Bocarter keeps in a cage.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: U-Fly/ Yeti or Not
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Bored Identity/ Country Clubbed
programme.desc: Dad is depressed because everyone thinks he is boring. Timmy wishes Dad's life was more like an action movie. Timmy and his parents get invited to a country club. Cosmo feuds with a gopher. Timmy wishes to be a socialite.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Scary GodCouple
programme.desc: Foop becomes Vicky's anti-fairy godparent. Vicky and Foop terrorize Timmy and the kids of Dimmsdale. Foop tells Vicky that the reason Timmy has thwarted her all these years is because he has fairy godparents. Now, they want to destroy the fairies.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Cosmonopoly/ Hero Hound
programme.desc: Timmy, his dad, and fairies get stuck in a board game created by Cosmo. Timmy wishes Sparky would get a chance to be heroic.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: A Boy and His Dog-Boy/ Crock Blocked
programme.desc: Timmy wishes Sparky was a human. Timmy becomes a dog and has to convince Sparky to change back to canine form. Timmy wishes Mr. Crocker would disappear. Mr. Crocker becomes invisible. Dad thinks the house is haunted.

programme.title: Danger Force: Mika in the Middle
programme.desc: A surprise from Schowz's mom might cause Mika to fail her test on not snitching.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Kid Plays in the Picture/ Achy Breaky Art
programme.desc: Carl’s love for toys gets him caught up in a whirlwind toy review career./ Frida’s art gets a bad review, the kids try to stage a new auction to lift her spirits.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Loud House: One of the Boys/ A Tattler's Tale
programme.desc: Lincoln wishes he had ten brothers instead of ten sisters, and Lisa gives him a glimpse into that reality.

programme.title: The Loud House: No Such Luck/ Frog Wild
programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities. When Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Legacy
programme.desc: As the Empire attacks the rebel fleet on Garel, Kanan and Ezra return to Lothal and find a former prisoner with knowledge about Ezra's parents.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: A Princess on Lothal
programme.desc: An aide to Bail Organa is sent to Lothal with ships for the rebel fleet, but an Imperial lockdown forces the rebels to create a new plan to steal the vehicles.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bro Down
programme.desc: Chase outsmarts Adam with a prank that shatters his confidence; Chase in real danger.

programme.title: Lab Rats: The Rats Strike Back
programme.desc: The Lab Rats confide in Leo their frustrations at having to constantly train and their desire to do normal teenage things. Leo explains the concept of going on strike so they face off against Davenport, who calls their strike bluff and raises the stakes.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Parallel Universe
programme.desc: Leo is inadvertently sucked into Davenport's new invention and transported into a parallel universe where Tasha is a brilliant inventor, Davenport is her insecure assistant, and Leo finally has bionic abilities.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Teachers Break Their Promises
programme.desc: When the students learn their much-anticipated class trip has been cancelled due to budgetary reasons, they devise a plan to fight back. Meanwhile, Uncle Will, Dusty, Chance, and Herman turn the mall upside down to prank a security guard.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: So You Think You Can Middle School Dance
programme.desc: It's Herman's first school dance and the gang tries to teach him the ropes, but Herman ends up teaching them instead. Meanwhile, Uncle Will's mom is famous for her gigantic turkeys. Will invites a guest over a feast he won't soon forget.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: The Earth Gets Mooned
programme.desc: The gang takes part in an annual science competition at school, but they have trouble with their project partners.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Give Me All Your Cheese
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Royal Rumble
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: The Owl House: Really Small Problems
programme.desc: King confides in a carnival fortune teller who makes his dream come true, but it comes at a cost.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thanks But No Thanks/ Troy Story
programme.desc: Inspired by Candace’s book club selection, the boys decide to reenact the Trojan War from “The Illiad,” but with a Phineas and Ferb twist.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Love at First Byte/ One Good Turn
programme.desc: Mom asks for help and Candace and Stacy compete in Ultimate Obstacle Course.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Blood Moon
programme.desc: Cricket is excited for his first Halloween in Big City, where he and Tilly expect to collect way more candy than they ever got Trick-or-Treating in the country.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Shoes/ Feud Fight
programme.desc: When Cricket gets sick, his family steps in to fulfill his commitments for the day. Chip Whistler shows up at the farmers’ market in an attempt to steal business.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Internabout
programme.desc: Hiro's jealousy of Karmi's internship at Sycorax leads him to intern at Kreitech. Meanwhile, the rest of Big Hero 6 tries to deal with old foes, Noodle Burger Boy and Trina.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Seventh Wheel
programme.desc: Professor Granville becomes increasingly pushy with her suggestions for Big Hero 6 as she helps them try to figure out a mysterious series of food-related burglaries.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Prey Date
programme.desc: Hiro and Fred enlist Karmi to find out what Liv Amara is doing to cure Orso Knox, the man who was mysteriously turned into a monster.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Hiro gets set up with 14-year-old Megan, leading him to wonder if he's missing out on a normal life. The team must deal with an upgraded High Voltage.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Fate of the Roommates
programme.desc: Honey Lemon learns that she can return to her dorm, but Go Go realizes she doesn't want her to move out. The team looks to stop a secret underground racing league.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Nega-Globby
programme.desc: Honey Lemon sets out to cure Globby and make him human again. However, Big Hero 6 must now face a new different evil glob-like villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muira-Horror!
programme.desc: Hiro and Go Go accompany Krei to the woods to deal with Nedd Ludd, however they run into the monster of legend, the Hibagon, along the way.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy
programme.desc: When mysterious but adorable creatures called Mayoi suddenly appear in San Fransokyo, Hiro is convinced that they’re part of some nefarious plot by Liv Amara.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Supersonic Sue
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 attempt to thwart a bank robbery and are defeated by Supersonic Sue, an old school roller-skating villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Lie Detector
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: City of Monsters
programme.desc: Karmi and Hiro team up to help treat someone with genetically engineered parasites.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Write Turn Here

programme.title: Movie: Last Holiday

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Three on a Couch
programme.desc: Constant bickering causes the girls to seek help from a therapist. This prompts the girls to reminisce about times they didn't get along. The therapist's conclusion: they should not live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Charlie's Buddy
programme.desc: A wartime buddy of Rose's late husband arrives in Miami to see Rose. However, he has more in mind than just a friendly visit. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Blanche haggle over the same dress to wear to a social event.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Artist
programme.desc: Dorothy, Blanche and Rose all agree to pose for the Hungarian sculptor Laszlo.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche's Little Girl
programme.desc: Blanche is thrilled by a visit from her daughter, Rebecca, an ex-model who has now gained quite a bit of weight. Also visiting with Rebecca is her oafish beau who constantly puts down her weight.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dorothy's New Friend
programme.desc: Dorothy befriends a novelist, Barbara Thorndyke, and she quickly infringes on Dorothy's relationship with Blanche and Rose, who think Barbara is nothing but a stuck up snob.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Grab That Dough
programme.desc: The girls fly to Los Angeles to appear on their favourite game show.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: My Brother My Father
programme.desc: Sophia's brother, Angelo, a priest, is coming to Miami for a visit and he doesn't know Dorothy and Stan are divorced. So in order to spare his feelings, Sophia convinces Dorothy and Stan to pretend to be married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Golden Moments
programme.desc: The girls begin to panic when Sophia says she's moving out to go live with her son.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Golden Moments
programme.desc: The girls begin to panic when Sophia says she's moving out to go live with her son.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Ma Makes Three
programme.desc: Feeling sorry for a lonely Sophia, Dorothy allows her to come along on a date with her and Dorothy's latest beau. However, pretty soon Sophia begins tagging along on every date which puts a rift in Dorothy's romantic plans.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Piece of Cake
programme.desc: While preparing for a friend's birthday party, the girls recall past birthdays, including Rose's surprise birthday party for Dorothy, a surprise birthday party for Blanche and a memory of Sophia's birthday involving her late-husband Sal.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Empty Nests
programme.desc: Renee is feeling depressed and lonely with her children grown up and moved out and her husband's workaholic habits.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Housekeeper

programme.title: Reba: The Ghost and Mrs. Hart

programme.desc: The unit draws closer to finding a dangerous serial killer. Rusty faces his biggest challenge yet when he takes the stand against Phillip Stroh. Meanwhile the team goes head to head with a touch attorney.

programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.desc: Josh joins local divers in the Southeast Asian country of Myanmar to search for the ancient cursed Golden Bell of King Dhammazedi. To recover it, Josh dives into murky, violent waters that have claimed the lives of other divers.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Dead Mountain Solved
programme.desc: Braving the sub-zero conditions of Siberia, Josh Gates investigates one of the strangest and most brutal cold cases: the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Nine Soviet hikers died suspiciously. Sixty years later, no one knows how or why.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Siberia's Oldest Mystery
programme.desc: Josh Gates concludes his in-depth investigation of the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Taking on Dead Mountain's brutal conditions, Josh and two investigators retrace the hikers' last steps. A big discovery could finally solve the mystery.

programme.title: Expedition X: Canyon of the Apes
programme.desc: Chasing Bigfoot's origin story, Phil and Jessica uncover a rash of recent sightings and bone-chilling new evidence in the Pacific Northwest. New leads about a frightening encounter send them into rocky, dangerous terrain along Mount St. Helens.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Chupacabra
programme.desc: In the dark caves and thick jungles of Puerto Rico, Josh Gates tracks a possible Chupacabra.

programme.title: Expedition X: Ghosts in the Canal
programme.desc: Josh wants to investigate ghostly sightings and terrifying sounds coming from an abandoned canal along the Potomac. Jess and Phil dive into the murky depths and search secret tunnels that make this America's most haunted waters.

programme.title: Expedition X: Canyon of the Apes
programme.desc: Chasing Bigfoot's origin story, Phil and Jessica uncover a rash of recent sightings and bone-chilling new evidence in the Pacific Northwest. New leads about a frightening encounter send them into rocky, dangerous terrain along Mount St. Helens.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Chupacabra
programme.desc: In the dark caves and thick jungles of Puerto Rico, Josh Gates tracks a possible Chupacabra.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Two Kills
programme.desc: Needing a big kill to sustain them through the winter, Heimo takes Krin and Scott to his best caribou hunting grounds. Tyler and Ashley want running water in their cabin.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: No Regrets
programme.desc: The loss of Bob Harte is felt across the Refuge. Heimo boats to Bob's cabin to bring Bob's possessions to his family. Charlie recovers his father's shotgun from a hidden survival cache and hunts small game. Edna prepares her favorite meal, caribou head.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Hunter Is Hunted
programme.desc: As moose season opens, the hunt is on to get meat to sustain them through winter. As Charlie looks for a kill, he realizes he's being stalked by a bear. Heimo takes Krin to his best moose territory. Tyler takes to the skies to assess the fire damage.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Winter's Wrath
programme.desc: Tyler needs to hunt a moose to feed in family. Heimo and Scott race to get the boat off the freezing water. Bob's daughter and ex-wife return to his cab to honor his memory.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Hard Choices
programme.desc: Heimo is desperate to get a moose for winter. Charlie and Tyler have to overcome fire damage on their traplines.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Never Gets Easier
programme.desc: With no meat for winter, Heimo's desperate to run his trapline, but has no choice but to hunt for moose. Tyler's plan to run his sled dog team is threatened when the pack turns on each other.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Biting Back
programme.desc: Heimo tests his trapping skills on both land and water to outsmart one of his favorite catches, beaver. Scott puts lessons learned to the test as he tracks marten. Tyler's plan to run his sled dog team is threatened when the pack turns on each other.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Laying Down Their Legacy
programme.desc: Scrambling to finish trapping season, Heimo discovers the best catch of the season: a wolf. Charlie walks a legend's footsteps as he works the traplines Bob left to him. Tyler takes on the challenge of getting their hunting cabin ready for next season.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Outlaws Legacy
programme.desc: Chief, Farmtruck and Azn highlight eight plus years of racing insanity in the 405. Plus: a first look at Sin City Showdown, exclusively on Discovery+.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Winter's Fury
programme.desc: Marty, Matt and Misty Raney help the Russell family struggling on a failing homestead in the forests of Pennsylvania. During the biggest storm of the century, the family faces a food shortage with no hunting skills and a cabin on the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Killzone
programme.desc: Marty helps homesteaders in Oregon build a barn; Misty creates a subterranean garden; Matt finds a human approach to a mysterious predator threat.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Abandoned and Alone
programme.desc: In Montana, the Raneys help Beth and Mike Ettinger who live in an abandoned ghost town where many previous homesteaders failed. Survival is a battle on this homestead that is stalked by a mountain lion and void of any livestock, water or food.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake on the Forty
programme.desc: The Raneys return to Alaska to discover their own homestead in utter disrepair. Beetle kill has destroyed their only access, so they race to build a steel tram before the deep freeze sets in.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Moose Mayhem
programme.desc: To save a single mom and her daughter from rampaging moose and secure a source of food, Marty builds a bridge across a murky creek to access more property, Matt teaches predator deterrent techniques and Misty builds a snow-proof greenhouse.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Schenee's Story
programme.desc: Devastated by two miscarriages due to her weight, Schenee is desperate to start a family.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Cillas and Tiffany: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Cillas must face difficulties from his childhood in order to progress to his goal weight and set an example for his children. Tiffany struggles to lose weight when financial hardships place a strain on her relationship with her boyfriend Aaron.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Incredible Shrinking Lipoma

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Leave It to Nevus
programme.desc: With pandemic safety protocols in place, Dr. Lee reopens her office. Monica has a large birthmark growing on the side of her face. Jackie has a melon-sized lump on the back of her shoulder. Reginald has large, rare growths on the back of his head.

programme.title: Save My Skin: Quasimodo No Mo'

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Turtle Trouble
programme.desc: A man has a snapping turtle clamped to his neck, and it will not let go. As a hurricane closes in, an ER doctor rushes to get all the patients out. A man is impaled by a chainsaw while trimming trees twenty feet high.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: A Tale of Two Rivers

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Matt/ Sarah
programme.desc: To afford his dream of becoming a pro-wrestler, Matt has reduced his spending to just $300 a month. Extreme Cheapskate Sarah saves on groceries by never leaving one of her family's catering events without leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Father Knows Debt
programme.desc: Patriarch Raul Pinto scours through vacuum canisters at the car wash in hopes of finding spare change. Kia Cambridge limits herself to one piece of gum, every three days.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The Grass is Always Cheaper

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Pool Rules: No Spending

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Feast or Famine
programme.desc: Cooking instructor Ron Maestri shows us how to cook for lobster taste on a tunafish budget. Rocker Goldy Locks converted an abandoned hospital into her home, for just the fraction of the price.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Rick and Karissa/ Torski
programme.desc: Karissa and her husband Rick have been competing to be cheaper than the other since their wedding five years ago. By sharing everything from their shower to a single toothbrush, this cheapskate couple has no limit to their cost cutting.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Melody/ Marlin
programme.desc: Melody manages to only spend $1,000 a month for her family of four by sharing her extreme ways. They all sleep in one bed and share bath water. Also, Marlin will face his biggest cost-saving challenge as he organizes his daughter's sweet sixteen.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Roy and Ben
programme.desc: Ben and Roy show off their frugal lifestyles. Ben throws a party on a four dollar budget and Roy shows how he freezes his assets.

programme.title: 900 Pound Man: The Race Against Time
programme.desc: At 900 lbs., Ricky is one of the world's largest men. Follow Ricky over three years as he struggles to find a surgeon willing to take on his case and a way off the island of Guam to get the potentially lifesaving surgery he desperately needs.

programme.title: 600 Pound Mom
programme.desc: Dominique is imprisoned within her house because of morbid obesity, leaving her six daughters worried for her life. Dominique will have to shed 112 lbs. to qualify for weight-loss surgery, her only hope.

programme.title: Modern Family: Airport 2010
programme.desc: For Jay's birthday, Gloria gives him the best surprise: a romantic getaway to Hawaii. The only kicker is she invited the entire family to come along. Everyone arrives at the airport, and it's quite a scene, filled with forgotten IDs and flying phobias.

programme.title: Modern Family: Hawaii
programme.desc: A relaxing family vacation in Hawaii gets slightly derailed when everyone has their own idea of fun.

programme.title: Modern Family: Family Portrait
programme.desc: Claire painstakingly plans for a new family portrait to be taken, but it seems like everything and everybody is working against her. Gloria and Manny go with Phil and Alex to a Lakers game and end up having a very awkward moment on the jumbotron.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Old Wagon
programme.desc: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old station wagon, but not before everyone takes it on one last ride down memory lane. Meanwhile, when Mitchell decides to build a life-sized princess castle for Lily, Cameron calls in Jay for support.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Kiss
programme.desc: Gloria decides to cook more traditional Colombian meals, which is met with some ribbing from Jay. Claire finds herself becoming an overbearing mom when she learns that Alex likes a boy.

programme.title: Modern Family: Earthquake
programme.desc: An earthquake hits, leaving Claire stuck in the bathroom with the plumber. Manny experiences an existential crisis while out with Jay, while Mitchell and Cameron use the quake as a way to get out of a brunch party.

programme.title: Modern Family: Strangers on a Treadmill
programme.desc: Claire and Mitchell help each other spare their significant others from embarrassment. Jay goes to a Quinceañera to prove a point to Gloria, and Haley gives sisterly advice to Alex.

programme.title: Modern Family: Unplugged
programme.desc: Noticing that everyone is too busy on their electronic devices to actually interact with one another, Claire and Phil declare a family challenge to see who can stay unplugged the longest.

programme.title: Modern Family: Halloween
programme.desc: Claire loves Halloween and is gearing up to make the Dunphy house spooky for the trick-or-treaters. She gives each family member a role to play, but none of it goes quite right.

programme.title: Modern Family: Chirp
programme.desc: Claire and Haley have a bit of quality girl time while they are home together sick. Meanwhile, Phil becomes preoccupied with the taunts of a chirping smoke detector, and Gloria and Manny surprise Jay at work.

programme.title: Modern Family: Manny Get Your Gun
programme.desc: Everyone gathers at a restaurant to celebrate Manny's birthday, though Manny himself is experiencing a mini life crisis about getting older. Meanwhile, Claire and Phil decide to engage in a not-so-friendly car race on the way to the restaurant.

programme.title: Modern Family: Mother Tucker
programme.desc: When Cameron's larger-than-life mother comes to town, Mitchell doesn't know how to tell Cam that his mother makes him uncomfortable. Meanwhile, when Haley breaks up with Dylan, Phil takes it harder than anyone else.

programme.title: Modern Family: Dance Dance Revelation
programme.desc: It's Luke and Manny's first school dance, and everyone gets in on the fun. Jay and Phil take the boys to the mall, while Claire and Gloria are on the dance committee. Mitch and Cam are horrified to learn that Lily's been biting other children.

programme.desc: She was a young mom, pregnant with her second child, when she was gunned down on her way to work. Police zeroed in on the men in her life. To help find her killer, her sisters became amateur detectives and uncovered a secret.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Unholy Secrets

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: One Pol Over the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: It's a chirpy and chipper set of cases for the vets of Pol Veterinary Services as they deal with ornery ungulates, cut colts, knobby knees and more.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Wizard of Paws
programme.desc: The clinic is going to the dogs as the vets have their paws full with this motley crew of pups.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Doc Nose Best
programme.desc: Neither rain nor snow can stand in the way of the team at the clinic, but this year, the weather is putting them to the test.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Twist and Snout
programme.desc: Pol Veterinary Services has an exciting new addition to the clinic staff: Dr. Emily's husband, Tony.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Cranes, Sprains and Automobiles
programme.desc: Spontaneous blizzards and chill temperatures are complicating things at Pol Veterinary Services this spring, but that doesn’t slow the team down.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Return of Dr. Strangeglove
programme.desc: Weird and abnormal things happen every day at Pol Veterinary Services, but things are downright strange this week as Dr. Pol and his team treat some of the most bizarre patients they have ever seen.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Back to the Suture
programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dr. Jan Pol as he treats animals at his clinic in rural Michigan.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: My Fair Piggy
programme.desc: The Isabella County Fair is just around the corner, which means Dr. Pol, Dr. Emily and Dr. Brenda are busy treating fair animals, making sure they are in tiptop shape for competition.

programme.title: Alaska Animal Rescue: Beast Friends Forever
programme.desc: A bald eagle prepares for freedom and a lonely caribou needs a new family.

programme.title: Alaska Animal Rescue: Duck, Duck, Moose!
programme.desc: An elk is tangled in wire, and an eagles wing presents a new challenge.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When NASA Met Jupiter
programme.desc: NASA's Juno spacecraft is part of a cutting-edge mission to explore the mysteries of Jupiter. As this mighty probe is pummeled with deadly radiation, it gathers new data that could change everything we know about the solar system's biggest planet.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: NASA's Journey to Mars
programme.desc: NASA is on a mission to send humans to Mars within just 15 years, but to reach this next frontier of space exploration, experts must discover brand-new technology and cutting-edge science that protects astronauts from the Red Planet's deadliest killers.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monster Black Hole
programme.desc: Black holes are the least understood places in the universe, where the rules of physics collapse. We go inside the supermassive black hole in the center of the Milky Way to uncover terrifying secrets about parallel universes, wormholes, and space-time.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Universe: Our Solar System: Pluto: The Dark Reaches
programme.desc: In the darkest reaches of the Solar System, the dwarf planet Pluto lies in a previously unknown region of space until an underground group of scientists took on the establishment and sent a spacecraft to the most distant world that's ever been explored.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret Lives of Neutrinos
programme.desc: Neutrinos are the most mysterious particles in the universe, and they power some of the most explosive events in the cosmos; new discoveries reveal how these ghosts pass through objects undetected and why they could be the reason we exist.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Space Force Declassified
programme.desc: Explorers tackle the mysteries of life itself leading us to worlds never before seen.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Giant Ice Planets
programme.desc: Astronomers are finally unlocking the mysteries to the alien underworlds of Uranus and Neptune, and experts reveal how an ancient mega-collision and a missing twin planet could uncover the secrets of these strange and frozen worlds.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret Lives of Neutrinos
programme.desc: Neutrinos are the most mysterious particles in the universe, and they power some of the most explosive events in the cosmos; new discoveries reveal how these ghosts pass through objects undetected and why they could be the reason we exist.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Space Force Declassified
programme.desc: Explorers tackle the mysteries of life itself leading us to worlds never before seen.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Giant Ice Planets
programme.desc: Astronomers are finally unlocking the mysteries to the alien underworlds of Uranus and Neptune, and experts reveal how an ancient mega-collision and a missing twin planet could uncover the secrets of these strange and frozen worlds.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Universe: Our Solar System: Pluto: The Dark Reaches
programme.desc: In the darkest reaches of the Solar System, the dwarf planet Pluto lies in a previously unknown region of space until an underground group of scientists took on the establishment and sent a spacecraft to the most distant world that's ever been explored.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Attack of the Fire Devil
programme.desc: A man is recorded surviving two lightning strikes in moments. Cameras spot strange lights in the sky in Norway, turning a remote area into a UFO hot spot. A bizarre glowing object is caught on tape at a museum, and some wonder if it's an alien artifact.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Marine scientists discover a gruesome underwater death zone that seems to kill anything that dares to enter. When apocalyptic skies appear during a deadly earthquake in Ecuador, residents fear it's the end of days.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Night of the Chupacabra
programme.desc: A camera captures footage of a Chupacabra-like beast. At an observatory on Hawaii's Mauna Kea, cameras record a mysterious explosion that looks like a nuclear bomb detonated in space. Video of spontaneous combustion is taken at a haunted bar.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost in the Abyss
programme.desc: A deep-ocean expedition discovers unnerving evidence of an alien-like monster stirring in the abyss. When an apocalyptic shockwave is caught on tape, investigators wonder if a meteor has hit a city. Something bizarre is happening in a Siberian ice river.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Mayan Treasure
programme.desc: An explorer searching for treasure at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by a mysterious underwater fog. Thousands of fish spontaneously jump to their deaths. Something alien appears over the skies of Lost Angeles.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Exorcist Effect
programme.desc: A boy who can twist his head 180 degrees and face directly behind him resembles infamous accounts of demonic possession from horror films; experts use cutting-edge technology to find out what's giving him this extreme ability.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: America's Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: A strange creature like the Loch Ness Monster is recorded in America. Experts analyze evidence of a giant scaly egg, and some wonder if it belongs to a dragon. Birds are suddenly vaporized by an invisible death ray.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Midnight Train to Hell
programme.desc: A sinister locomotive breathes fire into the night sky, and locals fear it's a demonic train coming to claim their souls. When something terrifying emerges from a mysterious lake in Ireland, experts wonder if it could be a modern-day leviathan.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Beast That Ate Jaws
programme.desc: When a shark is eaten by a mysterious predator, experts wonder if a prehistoric monster is to blame. A sinister sight is caught on tape near Russia's Area 51, and the evidence might point to a cover-up.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Incident at Area 51
programme.desc: Near Area 51, a police convoy is filmed transporting an alien-looking craft in the dead of night. When strange beams of light are reported in Argentina, experts investigate if it's proof of a terrifying Nazi superweapon.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover an unknown monster thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Killer fog threatens a town in the American Midwest. A truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chinese Nuclear Pyramid
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of a mythical lost pyramid in China that's been hidden for centuries, and experts suspect it could be just one of many unknown structures used as a secret military base designed for subterranean nuclear warfare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of the Mummy Desert
programme.desc: New evidence could reveal the remains of an ancient Roman city thought to be lost forever. Strange images from a remote and empty desert could explain the mysterious mummies found there. An apocalyptic sandstorm swallows the Middle East.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Danger in Store
programme.desc: After a bad breakup, single mom Joi Partain finds love again with Jonathan Pearson. But after the couple moves to Ocala, Florida with Joi's daughter, troubles in their relationship spiral until they hit a bloody, brutal point of no return.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Officer Down
programme.desc: When a uniformed police officer is found murdered in the middle of a deserted road, it's up to Detective Earl Peters to figure out who downed his colleague in cold blood.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Werewolf Butcher
programme.desc: When Jack 'Roy' Spillman started collecting wolf memorabilia, his sisters thought it was just an odd hobby. But when they learned of horrific things he had done, they realized some people may have been right when they called him 'more animal than human.'

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Girl in the Park
programme.desc: A deceased female's brutally beaten and sexually assaulted body turns up in Farmington, New Mexico. With an unidentified victim and plenty of suspects, detectives struggle with one of the most challenging 'whodunits' of their career.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: I'd Kill Them Again
programme.desc: Officers own body-cam footage is used to share cases through the eyes of detectives.

programme.title: See No Evil: Gold Pontiac
programme.desc: When roommates Amanda Douglas and Jennifer Sudar Sanders are gunned down in broad daylight, police suspect a personal motive. Detectives hunt for surveillance video of the womens' final hours, hoping it will reveal the clues they need to catch a killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Meet Me at Midnight
programme.desc: In Calgary, Alberta, 24-year-old Ryan Lane receives a late-night call and heads out to meet the mystery caller. He is never heard from again. Calgary Police Service turns to surveillance video to locate Ryan and finds evidence of a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: I'd Kill Them Again
programme.desc: Officers own body-cam footage is used to share cases through the eyes of detectives.

programme.title: See No Evil: Gold Pontiac
programme.desc: When roommates Amanda Douglas and Jennifer Sudar Sanders are gunned down in broad daylight, police suspect a personal motive. Detectives hunt for surveillance video of the womens' final hours, hoping it will reveal the clues they need to catch a killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Captain Freddy
programme.desc: On August 15th 2015, police are alerted to the body of Fernando Silva on a boat. With the crime scene revealing little about what caused his death, police turn to surveillance footage for clues.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Down by Fire
programme.desc: Ryne Zahner is an inspiration to his high school math students in Arizona. His friends see him as one of the nicest people they know. When a hooded murderer guns him down after a night of partying, the entire community struggles to grasp his murder.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: New England Nightmare
programme.desc: When a mysterious photograph is found in the home of a slain mother and daughter, a killer is exposed.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Good Fences Make Dead Neighbors
programme.desc: Instead of a brand new start, a man's move to Canyon Country, California, finds him locked in a bizarre and increasingly acrimonious eight year feud with his neighbor – that is finally resolved with blasts from a shotgun.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When the body of 18-year-old Sharyn Kills Back is found in a Texas storm drain, Arlington detectives are left with few leads. But when a tip comes in from Fort Worth police twenty years later, detectives band together to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Rocky Waters
programme.desc: After a baby is found abandoned along Ohio's Scioto River, police discover the child's mother has been tragically murdered. Out to bring justice to 21-year-old Stephanie Evan's family, officers uncover secrets about someone in the young mom's past.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Creek Runs Red
programme.desc: After a Tennessee fisherman finds a woman's body floating in a creek, family secrets, decades-long feuds, and a suspicious funeral shine light on a complex conspiracy. But the truth is far more shocking than anyone could have ever imagined.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: My Friend, the End
programme.desc: When 18 year-old Harmahn Smith goes missing, his parents call on the CMPD to find him. Detectives run down every lead searching for the teenager, ultimately discovering the terrible details of what had begun for Harmahn as an uneventful night out.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Where is Claudia Jane?
programme.desc: A fifteen-year old girl is reported missing, and Lt. Joe Kenda must investigate the mysterious circumstances surrounding her disappearance. Then When a family man is shot dead on his neighbor's doorstep, was it self-defense or coldblooded murder?

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Fair Game
programme.desc: A handicapped fair worker is shot in the face for no apparent reason. To solve this tragic mystery, Detective Rod Demery must retrace the victim's final steps and string together a series of seemingly unrelated clues.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Reuschel vs. Reuschel
programme.desc: A wealthy Florida businessman is arrested after a violent confrontation with his wife, and his daughter's sumptuous wedding may have inspired his murderous rage.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A landscaper that has an obsession for his client won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Cling 'Til Death
programme.desc: These Deadly Women won't let their men go.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Lust for Murder
programme.desc: When Stacie Smith is found dead and an accusation that she has been unfaithful is written on the wall of the crime scene, police believe that a jealous lover is behind her brutal death. But that might just be a ploy to frame the wrong man for the crime.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder Behind the Gates
programme.desc: A couple of opposites come together to form a power couple, but, they soon learn that their money can't buy love and happiness, it can only buy death.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Cowboys vs. Hollywood
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, it's time to rethink Hollywood's vision of the old west and learn about the truth behind some of America's renowned rivalries.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Booze and Bullets
programme.desc: Our memories of the roaring twenties and lawless thirties are more myth than truth. Learn the shocking realities about prohibition and that rogue's gallery of gangsters including John Dillinger and Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Booze and Bullets
programme.desc: Our memories of the roaring twenties and lawless thirties are more myth than truth. Learn the shocking realities about prohibition and that rogue's gallery of gangsters including John Dillinger and Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Cowboys vs. Hollywood
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, it's time to rethink Hollywood's vision of the old west and learn about the truth behind some of America's renowned rivalries.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Joseph Stalin
programme.desc: It's clear Nazi Germany lost the war, but the real winner remains uncertain. At the Yalta Conference, the United States, Britain and the Soviet Union compete for domination of Europe.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Gourmet Holiday
programme.desc: A showcase of gourmet food for holiday entertaining or for gift giving.

programme.title: Outdoor Entertaining

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Smart Suburban Holmes
programme.desc: With the interior of the river house complete, it's time to focus on the suburban home as the open house date is fast approaching. Mike, MJ and the crew work feverishly to get the smart home ready and receive the valuation they're hoping to earn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Thousand Goodbyes
programme.desc: Flooring takes center stage inside the country house, while outside the barn is finally completed. The river house gets its finishing touches as Mike and MJ prepare to say goodbye to the Thousand Islands.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Holmes Stretch
programme.desc: The first property that Mike Holmes and his son, MJ, bought is the last to be finished. Time is money, and there's still a ton of work to be done before they can put the sign up on the lawn.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Ventilation Blues
programme.desc: Mike tackles a recently renovated home where nothing is leveling out. The problems start with the HVAC, which doesn't heat or cool and sounds like a jet engine every time it's on.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Five Years Old
programme.desc: A five-year-old house needs major repairs and the builder won’t do anything to help. Mike Holmes and his team of pros step in to give the family the safe home they need and make up for the shortcomings of minimum code.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Log Jam
programme.desc: Mark hires a family friend to build a custom log house for him to retire in. The budget has been maxed out and the home isn’t done, so he sends out an SOS that Mike Holmes answers.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Flood Suckers
programme.desc: After a historic downpour in the City of Toronto, Gina’s basement floods with water from the city’s sewage system. Mike does double-duty as he tries to save this family’s home as well as the memories stored in an old workshop in the basement.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Five Years Old

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Weekender
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael aim to help restore Galveston's reputation as America's 'Playground of the South.'

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Budget Bungalow
programme.desc: Michael sees potential in what once was a Victorian bungalow that has been eaten away by termites leaving catastrophic damage.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Yellow Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley falls in love with an old Victorian that still has most of its original details.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Destined for Demo
programme.desc: Ashley is feeling extremely overwhelmed.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Rockin' Resort Pool
programme.desc: The Pool Kings go above and beyond to create a project that has space for everyone in a big family. It includes a 15-foot tall natural rock grotto, swim-up bar, sun shelf and outdoor living room.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Three Rivers and a Pool
programme.desc: A couple want an alluring yard that incorporates the beauty of their cliff-side property. The enlarged yard area gets a deck bisected by a faux stream, a feature-filled pool with stone slab bridge, jumping boulders and even a slide.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Backyard Water Park
programme.desc: Brian and Paul Porter double the fun by giving a family not one, but two new pools. From a 60-foot slide and a sunken spa to a lazy river, the family gets a backyard water park that everyone can enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Southern Oasis Pool
programme.desc: A family wants to turn their flat Houston, Texas, yard into a southern oasis. Unpredictable weather, tricky soil conditions and some new material leaves Paul and Brian figuring out how to blow the family's expectations out of the water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dueling Waterslides
programme.desc: Brian and Paul design the perfect pool complete with giant dueling waterslides. They face a slippery slope, however, when they battle equipment issues while building an artificial hill to support tens of thousands of pounds of natural granite rock.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Custom Contemporary
programme.desc: Matt and Jen want to tear out their old deck and rebuild their backyard to match the hill country modern vibe they love and give them a place to enjoy quality family time.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Triples Infinity Edge
programme.desc: After saving for years, a couple of former teachers are splurging on the perfect pool for their new house in Austin, Texas. The nature lovers want a great view with sounds of waterfalls and space for family to visit.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Pool With a View
programme.desc: Paul and Brian learn the hard way that it isn't always so sunny in California as they transform an odd-shaped outdoor space into an elevated pool with an ocean view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Pool Party Paradise
programme.desc: Tony and Paul help a couple build their dream pool to go along with their newly built outdoor entertaining space. The guys are challenged to design around a giant concrete slab by creating a feature-packed pool that fits with the new space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hole in the Plan
programme.desc: An active Florida family recently traded in the tropical life for the cool countryside in Auburntown, Tennessee.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue Boss of All Sandwiches
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a meaty stacked sandwich and a beefy ballpark dog. In Oklahoma City, a gas station-turned-burger joint serves a fried apple and brie cheeseburger to fuel the soul.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Local Legends
programme.desc: From sandwiches to desserts, Noah discovers foods that put cities on the map and some that present an entire state.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Heat Is On
programme.desc: Hot, hot, hot carnival treats are the stars of this episode. From pleasingly piquant pretzels in California, to sweet and fiery desserts in New York, Noah gets up the courage to sample seven of the spiciest midway munchies from coast to coast.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hawaii Fried Dough
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the Aloha State for the 'Iolani Fair. This school fundraiser fair in Honolulu features Hawaiian-style fried dough in the Malasada Ice Cream Sandwich and Sweet Roll Sliders.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fruity Favorites
programme.desc: Noah Cappe samples some berry delicious fairground treats in this fruitful episode. Tart, sweet and perfect with breakfast, lunch or dinner, fruit makes everything pop. No forbidden fruits here, just some truly inventive fruit-filled creations.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Sweet 'n' Savory Sensations
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the fairgrounds to sample midway munchies that satisfy every taste bud, from sweet to savory. From a bratwurst topped with sauerkraut and apple pie to garlic enhanced doughnuts.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Handheld
programme.desc: Roger Mooking wraps his hands around 15 of America's best sandwiches, tacos, pizza slices, chicken wings and more. Creative chefs give a peek inside their kitchens with recipes and tips on how to make these flavorful one- and two-handed masterpieces.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Noodle Nirvana
programme.desc: From New York City Sicilians serving spaghetti in a cone, to a Vietnamese chef in Venice Beach rolling ramen noodles in a burrito, these chefs think way outside of the pasta box. New fusions are bringing noodles to the next level.

programme.title: Food Paradise: The Brunch Bunch
programme.desc: It's Sunday Funday every day in Food Paradise so we're checking out the most extreme brunch spots in the United States! First, there's a doughnut burger that's bringing both sweet and savory to California.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seoul Dip Sisters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets festive at the California Mid-Winter Fair and Fiesta! He's sampling the Seoul Dip- a Korean twist on the French Dip- then keeps things spicy with the Diablo Dog before going for a sweet finish with the Supreme Samoa doughnut stack.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Chowchilla-Madera to Ciao!
programme.desc: In the tiny town of Chowchilla, CA Noah Cappe discovers some carnival eats that deserve to be shared with the world. First up, it's the Deep Pit Barbeque, a meat extravaganza that takes three days to prepare.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Home Cooking
programme.desc: Roger scours the U.S. for all of the best treats from childhood, including home-cooked treats and decadent desserts.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Hey Butter Butter
programme.desc: Seafood dishes like hot lobster rolls and blue crab spaghetti get dressed in robes of butter at restaurants in Boston and New York while bakeries bring butter to new heights in their flaky pastries.

programme.title: Food Paradise: The Brunch Bunch
programme.desc: It's Sunday Funday every day in Food Paradise so we're checking out the most extreme brunch spots in the United States! First, there's a doughnut burger that's bringing both sweet and savory to California.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Toronto
programme.desc: Jordan Andino is exploring the culinary delights of Toronto, Canada's most diverse city.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Montreal
programme.desc: Jordan Andino explores the Montreal food scene and it doesn't disappoint. He heads to Notre Dame de Grace to try the late night discount menu at Monkland Tavern. Jordan falls in love with the braised calamari caponata.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Soul Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking joins chefs in their own kitchens as they honour the traditions of comforting and flavorful soul food dishes. From ribs, catfish and barbecue to oxtail, pork chops and cornbread.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Street Eats
programme.desc: Roger Mooking searches for the best food to eat on the fly, from food trucks and roadside stands to walk-up counters and carnival fare.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Feasts Over Fire in Hawaii
programme.desc: Roger's first visit to the 50th state promises big fires and big feasts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Seafood Feast
programme.desc: Brothers Vaughn and Gary Knowles take Roger to the docks for fresh lobsters and clams for a breathtaking seafood feast. The Nisqually Tribe teaches Roger ways of preparing seafood.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Wine Country Cookouts
programme.desc: California's wine country is the perfect place for an outdoor cookout. The weather is gorgeous, the wine is simply divine, and the food is down-right delicious. Roger has been invited to two parties: a pig roast in Paso Robles and a surf and turf grill.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger's in Southern California for two unbelievable backyard blowouts. Roger meets Chef Ben Ford in Tarzana.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smokin' Sides and Sweets
programme.desc: No cookout is complete without some outrageous side dishes and craveworthy desserts, so Roger Mooking is putting the main course aside to honor everything that tops off the best barbecue meals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Weekend BBQs
programme.desc: Roger visits two Southern California barbeque joints that serve smoked meat specialties on weekends.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: North Dakota State Fair/ Prairiefest
programme.desc: In North Dakota, host Noah Cappe chows down on Wild Rice Burgers, Idaho Tacos and Kettle Corn, which make up the regional fare in this western state.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Go Nuts for Donuts
programme.desc: Celebrating the best donuts carnivals have to offer.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: We Deep Fried That!
programme.desc: Celebrating the best carnival deep fried treats!

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheesy Rider
programme.desc: At the Prince William County Fair in Manassas, Va., Noah Cappe eats big with a monumental grilled cheese and has his interested peaked by the crab dip-topped Chesapeake Bay poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Him to the Greek Pizza
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is The Big Butler Fair in Butler, Penn., where he dines on a Euro-fusion Greek pizza, a crabby patty burger and a deep-fried chili dog, before finally tasting a fluffernutter elephant ear pasty.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Fruity Foodie
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shines the spotlight on fruit, one of the unsung heroes when it comes to food. Fruit has the ability to elevate just about any meal, so fill your plate with this fruity goodness to get your daily serving and then some.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Flavor Mashups
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds that marrying different dishes to create something new is a genius life hack. Whether it's a combination of cultures or a surprising mix of your favorite flavors, a good mashup is an exciting way to bring your meal to the next level.
